headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: April 12, 2026**
article:
The Arizona Diamondbacks fell short in a 3-4 decision to the Philadelphia Phillies, with Kyle Schwarber leading the Phillies' offense. In other news, the Detroit Tigers secured a convincing 6-1 victory over the Miami Marlins, with Riley Greene leading the charge at the plate.

Several key players have been impacted by injuries, including Hunter Harvey, who has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to right triceps inflammation. George Springer has been placed on the 10-day injured list with a left great toe fracture, while Adley Rutschman is out with left ankle inflammation. Royce Lewis and Cody Laweryson have also been placed on the injured list, with Lewis suffering a left knee sprain and Laweryson dealing with a right forearm strain.

The Milwaukee Brewers made a roster move, trading RF Steward Berroa to the Philadelphia Phillies for cash. The St. Louis Cardinals also made a trade, acquiring 2B Brayden Smith from the Baltimore Orioles in exchange for LHP Nick Raquet.

top_news.title: **Diamondbacks Fall Short in Philly**
top_news.summary: The Arizona Diamondbacks dropped a 3-4 decision to the Philadelphia Phillies, with Kyle Schwarber leading the Phillies' offense, hitting 1 home run and driving in 3 runs.

top_news.title: **Marlins Fall to Tigers in Dominant 6-1 Loss**
top_news.summary: The Detroit Tigers secured a convincing 6-1 victory over the Miami Marlins, with Riley Greene leading the charge at the plate. Greene's impressive performance included 2 hits, 1 home run, and 4 RBIs, while Casey Mize earned the win with 5.2 innings pitched, 5 strikeouts, and 1 earned run.

top_news.title: **Pirates Pull Off Thrilling 4-3 Victory Over Cubs**
top_news.summary: The Pittsburgh Pirates edged out the Chicago Cubs in a close game, winning 4-3. Braxton Ashcraft led the Pirates' pitching effort with 5.0 innings pitched, 9 strikeouts, 1 earned run, and 1 walk.

top_news.title: **Twins Take Down Blue Jays 7-4**
top_news.summary: The Minnesota Twins secured a 7-4 victory over the Toronto Blue Jays, with Trevor Larnach leading the offense and Joe Ryan dominating on the mound. Larnach hit a home run and drove in three runs, while Ryan pitched 7.0 innings with 5 strikeouts and 2 earned runs.

top_news.title: **Cubs' Hunter Harvey Lands on Injured List**
top_news.summary: Chicago Cubs right-handed pitcher Hunter Harvey has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to right triceps inflammation, effective retroactive to April 9, 2026.

top_news.title: **Brewers Make Roster Move**
top_news.summary: The Milwaukee Brewers traded RF Steward Berroa to the Philadelphia Phillies for cash on April 8, 2026.
